## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential collaboration on a new AI marketing and growth publication for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX aims to launch a publication focused on AI marketing and growth, featuring raw, vulnerable insights from industry professionals](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=72.0)
  - [Taylor Hatmaker, an experienced writer and editor, is being considered to help shape content and potentially ghostwrite articles](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [The publication will start with 1-2 posts every 1-2 weeks, aiming for \~2000 word articles with a mix of team member and client perspectives](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [A trial collaboration on one article will help determine fit and workflow before potentially expanding to regular content creation](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=314.0)

## Topics

### Publication Vision and Content Strategy

  - [Publication to be detached from GrowthX brand, focusing on real experiences in AI marketing and growth](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=235.0)
  - [Content to include deep dives into tactics, first-person accounts, and vulnerable insights](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Aim for 1800-2000 word articles, balancing depth with readability](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=103.0)
  - [Potential for multiple content types: conversational deep-dives, instructional guides, and personal narratives](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Launch with 2-3 articles, then aim for weekly cadence](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)

### Writer Collaboration Process

  - [Start with rough drafts or notes from team members](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=203.0)
  - [Conduct interviews or Zoom calls to flesh out ideas](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Taylor to help shape content, structure, and tone](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)
  - [Iterative process to refine voice and style for the publication](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)

### Pricing and Timeline

  - [Taylor's rate: $200/hour](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1031.0)
  - [Trial one article to determine fit and estimate costs](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Aim to launch first article in 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1412.0)
  - [Website design and branding to be developed concurrently (est. 2 weeks)](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

### Publication Goals and Company Vision

  - [Generate awareness about AI use in growth marketing](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)
  - [Bridge efficiency gap between AI developers and other knowledge workers](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1542.0)
  - [Align with GrowthX's mission to help non-engineers adapt to AI-driven work environments](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1567.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jason to invite Taylor to GrowthX Slack workspace](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Taylor to review shared Notion document and provide feedback on publication direction](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1603.0)
  - [Jason to determine first article topic and assign team member to work with Taylor](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Develop website design and branding over next 2 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Begin work on first article within 2-3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/xJTjwsjxtp9sK7-4TMtcznJTSyrLD_Dd?tab=summary&timestamp=1630.0)
